# MED — Platform grammar

Genus: **Mediagrammatica**

Whether the idea is translated to the platform surface.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H006 | *Mediagrammatica quaesitiva* var. h006-native-terminology-improves | A. Classification and search | Platform-native terminology improves relevance. | SAV | M-CST |
| H032 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h032-visual-resets-every | E. Visual rhythm and editing | Visual resets every 2–4s improve retention for educational Shorts. | MIX | M-CST |
| H037 | *Mediagrammatica pulsus* var. h037-native-style-beats | E. Visual rhythm and editing | Lo-fi/native style beats polished style in authenticity niches. | CTV | M-CST |
| H057 | *Mediagrammatica quaesitiva* var. h057-search-backed-tiktoks | H. Platform-specific | Search-backed TikToks have longer tails than trend-backed TikToks. | SEA | M-CST |
| H058 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h058-full-watch-optimisation | H. Platform-specific | Full-watch optimisation matters more for short, single-payoff TikToks. | RET | M-CST |
| H059 | *Mediagrammatica primafacialis* var. h059-frame-acts-like | H. Platform-specific | First frame acts like a thumbnail in Shorts. | MIX | M-CST |
| H060 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h060-engaged-views-matter | H. Platform-specific | Engaged views matter more than public views after the 2025 Shorts view-count change. | MIX | M-CST |
| H061 | *Mediagrammatica quaesitiva* var. h061-searchable-shorts-compound | H. Platform-specific | Searchable Shorts compound better than trend Shorts. | SEA | M-CST |

| H064 | *Mediagrammatica uncus* var. h064-follower-follower-need | H. Platform-specific | Follower content and non-follower content need different hooks. | FOL | M-CST |

| H075 | *Mediagrammatica quaesitiva* var. h075-searchable-shorts-compound | YouTube Shorts | Searchable Shorts compound better than trend Shorts. | SEA | M-CST |
| H077 | *Mediagrammatica serialis* var. h077-subscriber-conversion-improves | YouTube Shorts | Subscriber conversion improves when the Short clearly belongs to a series. | EHR | M-CST |
| H078 | *Mediagrammatica actionalis* var. h078-trial-reels-testing | Instagram Reels | Trial Reels are better for testing new formats because they reduce follower bias. | RET | M-CST |
| H079 | *Mediagrammatica actionalis* var. h079-sends-reach-growth | Instagram Reels | Sends per reach is the key growth metric for Reels discovery. | SND | M-CST |
| H080 | *Mediagrammatica uncus* var. h080-follower-follower-need | Instagram Reels | Follower content and non-follower content need different hooks. | FOL | M-CST |
| H081 | *Mediagrammatica actionalis* var. h081-highly-relatable-reels | Instagram Reels | Highly relatable Reels beat highly informative Reels for sends. | SND | M-CST |
| H082 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h082-reposted-watermarked-aesthetics | Instagram Reels | Reposted or watermarked aesthetics weaken recommendation potential. | RET | M-CST |
| H162 | *Mediagrammatica uncus* var. h162-hybrid-should-keyword | Search vs feed | Hybrid videos should put the keyword in the first two seconds while using a feed-native visual hook. | SEA | M-CST |
| H163 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h163-native-edits-outperform | Platform grammar | Platform-native edits outperform identical cross-posts. | MIX | M-CST |
| H164 | *Mediagrammatica quaesitiva* var. h164-reels-should-bias | Platform grammar | Reels should bias toward sendability, Shorts toward retention/search, and TikTok toward search/trend/comment loops. | SND | M-CST |
| H165 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h165-thesis-needs-different | Platform grammar | The same thesis needs different first-frame grammar per platform. | CTV | M-CST |
| H226 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h226-full-watch-skip | TikTok For You | Full-watch and skip behaviour should be treated as creative diagnostics before hashtags. | RET | M-CST |
| H227 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h227-native-conversational-openings | TikTok For You | Videos with native conversational openings outperform polished ad-like openings for creator-led advice. | MIX | M-CST |

| H229 | *Mediagrammatica captionis* var. h229-exact-problem-phrasing | TikTok Search | Exact problem phrasing in speech, caption and overlay increases search-match potential. | SEA | M-CST |
| H230 | *Mediagrammatica quaesitiva* var. h230-search-tiktoks-should | TikTok Search | Search-first TikToks should answer quickly, then deepen; feed-first TikToks can lead with tension. | SEA | M-CST |
| H231 | *Mediagrammatica quaesitiva* var. h231-topics-creator-search | TikTok Search | Content-gap topics from Creator Search Insights produce longer-tail views than purely trend-driven topics. | SEA | M-CST |
| H232 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h232-live-clips-retain | TikTok LIVE | Live clips retain better when edited around a complete question/answer unit. | MIX | M-CST |
| H233 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h233-live-previews-convert | TikTok LIVE | Live previews convert better when they promise a specific audience outcome. | MIX | M-CST |
| H234 | *Mediagrammatica textualis* var. h234-gift-comment-heavy | TikTok LIVE | Gift/comment-heavy live moments need context labels to travel as standalone clips. | CMT | M-CST |
| H235 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h235-shop-convert-problem | TikTok Shop / commerce | Shop videos convert better when the problem is demonstrated before the product link appears. | MIX | M-CST |
| H236 | *Mediagrammatica probatoria* var. h236-creator-proof-outperforms | TikTok Shop / commerce | Creator proof outperforms product spec lists for low-consideration products. | MIX | M-CST |
| H237 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h237-short-objection-handling | TikTok Shop / commerce | Short objection-handling videos generate more qualified clicks than hype-only demos. | CLK | M-CST |
| H238 | *Mediagrammatica primafacialis* var. h238-frame-behaves-like | YouTube Shorts feed | First frame behaves like a moving thumbnail and should be designed before the script is finalised. | MIX | M-CST |
| H239 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h239-engaged-views-scaling | YouTube Shorts feed | Engaged views are a better scaling metric than raw Shorts views after the 2025 view-count change. | MIX | M-CST |
| H240 | *Mediagrammatica serialis* var. h240-shorts-series-promise | YouTube Shorts feed | Shorts with a series promise convert more subscribers than isolated tips. | FOL | M-CST |
| H241 | *Mediagrammatica uncus* var. h241-searchable-shorts-need | YouTube Search / evergreen | Searchable Shorts need direct titles and direct first lines more than mystery hooks. | SEA | M-CST |
| H242 | *Mediagrammatica quaesitiva* var. h242-shorts-point-related | YouTube Search / evergreen | Shorts that point to a related long video increase total session value. | MIX | M-CST |
| H243 | *Mediagrammatica quaesitiva* var. h243-evergreen-tutorials-should | YouTube Search / evergreen | Evergreen tutorials should prioritise clarity over trend audio. | MIX | M-CST |
| H244 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h244-long-form-highlights | YouTube long-to-short bridge | Long-form highlights should be cut around one complete tension/payoff loop, not arbitrary timestamps. | MIX | M-CST |
| H245 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h245-shorts-preview-larger | YouTube long-to-short bridge | Shorts that preview a larger unresolved question can drive long-form traffic if the payoff remains honest. | MIX | M-CST |
| H246 | *Mediagrammatica primafacialis* var. h246-repurposed-long-form | YouTube long-to-short bridge | Repurposed long-form clips need new first frames; the long-form opening usually starts too slowly for Shorts. | MIX | M-CST |
| H247 | *Mediagrammatica actionalis* var. h247-replying-comments-shorts | YouTube comments / reply Shorts | Replying to comments with Shorts increases perceived relevance when the question is shown visually. | CMT | M-CST |
| H248 | *Mediagrammatica actionalis* var. h248-comment-reply-shorts | YouTube comments / reply Shorts | Comment-reply Shorts convert better when the answer expands into a reusable rule. | CMT | M-CST |
| H249 | *Mediagrammatica probatoria* var. h249-controversial-comments-power | YouTube comments / reply Shorts | Controversial comments can power videos, but source/proof must appear early to protect trust. | EHR | M-CST |
| H250 | *Mediagrammatica actionalis* var. h250-reels-should-bias | Instagram Reels feed | Reels should bias toward sendability when the content has identity/social relevance. | SND | M-CST |
| H251 | *Mediagrammatica textualis* var. h251-reels-clean-visual | Instagram Reels feed | Reels with clean visual hierarchy outperform cluttered meme-style overlays for educational content. | MIX | M-CST |
| H252 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h252-cover-improve-profile | Instagram Reels feed | A strong cover can improve profile-grid conversion even if feed autoplay carries initial reach. | CLK | M-CST |
| H253 | *Mediagrammatica uncus* var. h253-trial-reels-best | Instagram Trial Reels | Trial Reels are best for cold-audience hook testing, not follower-community content. | FOL | M-CST |
| H254 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h254-formats-trial-reels | Instagram Trial Reels | Formats that win Trial Reels should be scaled only if they also fit the account promise. | MIX | M-CST |
| H255 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h255-trial-reels-reveal | Instagram Trial Reels | Trial Reels can reveal whether a niche idea travels beyond existing audience familiarity. | MIX | M-CST |
| H256 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h256-stories-work-relationship | Instagram Stories | Stories work better for relationship and conversion than cold discovery. | MIX | M-CST |
| H257 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h257-polls-before-links | Instagram Stories | Polls before links increase link intent by creating participation momentum. | MIX | M-CST |
| H258 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h258-story-sequences-should | Instagram Stories | Story sequences should use one idea per frame to avoid drop-off. | MIX | M-CST |
| H259 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h259-pinned-reels-should | Instagram profile / pinned posts | Pinned Reels should explain the account promise, not just show the biggest viral hit. | MIX | M-CST |
| H260 | *Mediagrammatica textualis* var. h260-covers-explicit-series | Instagram profile / pinned posts | Covers with explicit series labels increase bingeing from profile visits. | CLK | M-CST |
| H261 | *Mediagrammatica actionalis* var. h261-clear-grid-architecture | Instagram profile / pinned posts | A clear grid architecture improves follow conversion after a single viral Reel. | FOL | M-CST |
| H262 | *Mediagrammatica uncus* var. h262-linkedin-perform-hook | LinkedIn native video | LinkedIn videos perform better when the hook names a professional tension, not a generic entertainment premise. | MIX | M-CST |
| H263 | *Mediagrammatica captionis* var. h263-subtitles-document-style | LinkedIn native video | Subtitles and document-style recap frames increase saves for professional education. | SAV | M-CST |
| H264 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h264-credibility-markers-matter | LinkedIn native video | Credibility markers matter more on LinkedIn than trend aesthetics. | MIX | M-CST |
| H265 | *Mediagrammatica primafacialis* var. h265-need-standalone-text | X / Twitter video | Videos on X need standalone text copy because many starts come from the post text rather than the first frame alone. | MIX | M-CST |
| H266 | *Mediagrammatica actionalis* var. h266-contrarian-clips-drive | X / Twitter video | Contrarian clips drive comments/reposts but need receipts to avoid low-trust dunking. | CMT | M-CST |
| H267 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h267-short-clips-quote | X / Twitter video | Short clips with one quote-worthy line spread better than dense tutorials. | MIX | M-CST |
| H268 | *Mediagrammatica uncus* var. h268-pinterest-style-should | Pinterest video / idea pins | Pinterest-style videos should prioritise search intent and evergreen utility over fast trend hooks. | SEA | M-CST |
| H269 | *Mediagrammatica actionalis* var. h269-final-checklist-cards | Pinterest video / idea pins | Final checklist cards increase saves because Pinterest users often collect future-use content. | SAV | M-CST |
| H270 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h270-vertical-process-visuals | Pinterest video / idea pins | Vertical process visuals outperform talking-head intros for DIY/recipe/design content. | MIX | M-CST |
| H271 | *Mediagrammatica storyformis* var. h271-stream-clips-travel | Twitch / stream ecosystem | Stream clips travel better when edited into a narrative unit: setup, tension, payoff. | MIX | M-CST |
| H272 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h272-creator-reaction-share | Twitch / stream ecosystem | Creator reaction is the share trigger when the event itself is common. | SND | M-CST |
| H273 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h273-clips-invite-back | Twitch / stream ecosystem | Clips that invite viewers back to a scheduled stream need a clear next-live promise. | MIX | M-CST |
| H274 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h274-cannot-classify-topic | Classification | If platform and viewer cannot classify the topic in 2 seconds, all downstream signals weaken. | MIX | M-CST |
| H349 | *Mediagrammatica facialis* var. h349-covers-matter-most | Cover / title | Covers matter most after feed exposure, when viewers visit the profile or search surface. | SEA | M-CST |
| H350 | *Mediagrammatica uncus* var. h350-titles-should-clearer | Cover / title | Titles should be clearer than hooks for search surfaces and more tensioned for feed surfaces. | SEA | M-CST |
| H424 | *Mediagrammatica nativa* var. h424-repurposed-long-clips | Repurposing | Repurposed long clips need new native openings for each platform. | MIX | M-CST |
